recommendation: Hybrid approach is viable but has tradeoffs: +40% top8 return vs -37% IC. Yahoo adds 360K historical rows (2019-2024) but 2 of 26 features (avg_trade_size_20d, vwap_dev_avg_20d) are unavailable from Yahoo. Quality score 0.72 is moderate — 116/318 tickers show >1% close diff due to dividend adjustment methodology. Recommend: (1) Use Yahoo historical for diversification but NOT as primary training source, (2) Investigate adjusting tolerance for dividend-adjusted vs unadjusted comparison, (3) Massive $29 subscription remains higher-value: full feature coverage + delisted tickers + unadjusted prices.
